test.command: python -m pytest tests/unit/ tests/core/ tests/domain/ tests/providers/ tests/utils/ -m "not integration and not slow and not external" --tb=short -q
test.note: 363 passed, 11 failed, 3 skipped, 1 error. ALL 11 failures + 1 error are pre-existing pandas_ta issues (NoneType attribute errors for ema, rsi, atr, bbands on Python 3.14). Same baseline as setup milestone. New test file (tests/test_llm_settings.py) passes 35/35.

typecheck.note: Suppressed via || true per services.yaml. Pre-existing upstream type issues only.

lint.note: Worker's modified files are lint-clean. 73 pre-existing upstream lint errors remain (unchanged from setup baseline).

format.note: Worker's modified files are format-clean (2 files already formatted). 27 pre-existing upstream format issues remain.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the _env_or_none() and _secret_or_none() helper pattern in the Coding Conventions section. Future workers adding env-var-backed settings fields should use these helpers (which handle empty-string-to-None coercion) instead of reimplementing inline lambda logic.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker introduced _env_or_none() and _secret_or_none() in maverick_mcp/config/settings.py (lines ~1058-1067). These are cleaner than the inline patterns used elsewhere in APISettings and other config classes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a known-issues note: Settings class in maverick_mcp/config/settings.py has pre-existing duplicate field declarations ('agent' at lines 1096/1109, 'validation' at lines 1099/1118). The first 'validation' has wrong default_factory=FinancialConfig. Python uses the last definition so it works at runtime, but this is a latent bug that a future worker should clean up.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Discovered during code review of llm-settings-config feature. Duplicate fields are in the pre-existing codebase, not introduced by this PR.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a convention for .env.example: new env var blocks should be added in a single consolidated section. The current file has a duplicate LLM config section (lines 56-71 commented, lines 85-110 with some uncommented). A cleanup pass should remove the first block.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: .env.example has 7 BYOK variables each appearing twice: once in a mid-file commented block (lines 56-71) and again in a bottom 'LLM / BYOK' section (lines 85-110).
